features.title: 7-Layer Carpentry Questionnaire
features.description: Multi-step questionnaire for German carpentry businesses: Company info, Employees, Premises & Safety, Products & Sales, Procurement, Environment, Insurance. Conditional logic, field validation, 'no company yet' toggle.

criteria.text: 7 layers render correctly with all field types
Conditional fields show/hide based on answers
'No company yet' toggle switches to planning mode
Required field validation enforced per layer
Conditional field cleanup on answer change

features.title: AI-Powered Regulation Scan
features.description: OpenAI GPT-5.2 integration via /api/scan. Takes business profile, returns matched regulations with risk levels, requirements, penalties, and personalized 'why this applies' explanations.

criteria.text: Scan returns matched regulations with risk levels
Server-side auth check + guest fallback
Rate limiting (30 req/min per IP)
60s timeout with AbortController
JSON parse error handling (502 on malformed)

features.title: Results Dashboard
features.description: Stats bar, business profile summary, regulation cards grouped by category. Risk badges (High/Medium/Low), key requirements, penalty warnings, compliance checkboxes, official source links.

criteria.text: Stats bar: Regulations Found, High Priority, EU Coverage, Compliance Score
Regulation cards with jurisdiction badges
Risk level badges with color coding
Compliance checkboxes persist to Supabase
Null-safe rendering with fallback values

features.title: Authentication & User Persistence
features.description: Supabase Auth with email/password. Sign up, sign in, sign out with confirmation dialog. Guest mode (1 scan, no persistence). Session persistence across refreshes.

criteria.text: Sign up with password validation (8+ chars, uppercase, number)
Sign in flow works
Guest mode allows 1 scan without auth
Logout confirmation dialog
Session persists across browser refreshes

features.title: Scan History
features.description: View past scans with date, business name, regulation count, compliance score. Re-open full results from any previous scan. Compliance checks loaded per scan.

criteria.text: Past scans listed with metadata
Re-open full results from any scan
Compliance checks loaded per scan via currentScanId
History cleared on sign-out

features.title: Internationalization (i18n)
features.description: Bilingual German (default) + English via next-intl. Locale routing (/de, /en). Language switcher in header. All UI strings in translation files.

criteria.text: German and English translations complete
Locale-based routing works (/de, /en)
Language switcher with flag emojis
Dynamic metadata with hreflang SEO

features.title: Risk Analysis (Phase 2 Addon)
features.description: AI-powered gap analysis with severity table, deadlines, penalty exposure, and mitigation recommendations. Persists to Supabase risk_reports table.

criteria.text: AI generates gap analysis from scan results
Severity table with penalties and deadlines
Persists to Supabase
60s Vercel function timeout configured

features.title: Recommendations (Phase 2 Addon)
features.description: Prioritized action list grouped by timeline (immediate/short-term/planned). Action vs insurance distinction. Enriched by risk analysis when available.

criteria.text: Prioritized action items generated
Grouped by timeline
Insurance suggestions included
Enriched by risk analysis when available

features.title: Newsletter System (Phase 2 Addon)
features.description: Preference management (opt-in, frequency, areas). React Email template for digest emails. Admin send endpoint via Resend API.

criteria.text: User can opt-in/out and set frequency
Preference auto-saves to Supabase
React Email template renders digest
Admin can send newsletter via Resend

features.title: Admin Panel
features.description: Admin users management, newsletter send/preview, subscriber list. Multi-admin support via comma-separated ADMIN_EMAIL. Trial plan controls per user.

criteria.text: Admin auth via ADMIN_EMAIL env var
Multi-admin support (comma-separated emails)
User list with plan management
Newsletter preview and send
Subscriber list view

features.title: Freemium Model & Trial System
features.description: Free plan (basic scan) vs Pro plan (risk analysis, recommendations, newsletter). 30-day trial via localStorage + Supabase sync. Admin can control trial per user.

criteria.text: Free vs Pro feature gating works
30-day trial starts on user action
Trial syncs to Supabase for admin visibility
Admin can set/reset user plan

features.title: Expert Profiles
features.description: Compliance expert profiles with photos, specializations, and contact buttons. Displayed on dashboard and results pages.

criteria.text: Expert cards with photos and specializations
Contact button per expert

features.title: Mobile Responsive Design
features.description: All UI components work on mobile. Sidebar responsive behavior. Tailwind responsive prefixes used throughout.

criteria.text: Sidebar works on mobile
Questionnaire mobile-friendly
Results cards stack properly on small screens

features.title: Legal Pages
features.description: Impressum and Datenschutzerklaerung (Privacy Policy) pages with proper German legal content.

criteria.text: Impressum page renders
Datenschutz page renders

features.title: URL Routing (Shallow)
features.description: Screen state synced to URL via pushState. Scan-specific URLs include scanId. Back/forward browser navigation works.

criteria.text: Each screen has a unique URL path
Scan-specific routes include scanId
Browser back/forward works

features.title: Dynamic Questionnaire + Handelsregister Integration
features.description: Replace static carpentry questionnaire with dynamic industry detection. User enters company name → Handelsregister lookup via German VPS → extract Gegenstand → AI generates industry-specific questions → compliance scan with industry context.

features.title: Epic 1: Python Microservice on VPS
features.description: Deploy Flask REST API wrapping handelsregister_extended.py on Peter's GlobalHair VPS (187.77.93.207, Frankfurt). Expose /api/company endpoint for company lookup + Gegenstand extraction.

criteria.text: E1.1 — Flask app with /api/company?search=X endpoint
E1.2 — /health endpoint for monitoring
E1.3 — Error handling (no results, timeout, rate limit)
E1.4 — API key auth (X-API-Key header)
E1.5 — Deploy to VPS (187.77.93.207) with systemd service
E1.6 — Nginx reverse proxy (SSL deferred — IP-only for now)
E1.7 — Test: curl from external IP returns company data

features.title: Epic 2: Next.js Integration + Company Search UI
features.description: Connect Vercel app to VPS microservice. Build company search screen where user enters company name, sees results, confirms selection.

criteria.text: E2.1 — lib/handelsregister-client.ts: VPS API wrapper with timeout + retry
E2.2 — app/api/handelsregister/route.ts: proxy route (hides VPS URL + API key)
E2.3 — hooks/useCompanyLookup.ts: search state, loading, error, results
E2.4 — CompanySearchScreen: full-page search with input + results list
E2.5 — CompanySearchInput: debounced input, loading spinner, result cards
E2.6 — Company confirmation: 'Is this your company?' with Gegenstand preview
E2.7 — Add 'company-search' screen to lib/routes.ts + page.tsx
E2.8 — i18n strings in de.json + en.json (CompanySearch namespace)
E2.9 — Mobile responsive (works on phone screens)

features.title: Epic 3: AI Industry Detection + Question Generation
features.description: AI classifies Gegenstand into industry code, generates industry-specific compliance questions, caches templates in Supabase for reuse.

criteria.text: E3.1 — lib/industry-detector.ts: Gegenstand → industry_code via GPT-5.2
E3.2 — Supabase migration: industry_templates table
E3.3 — Template caching: check DB before generating new questions
E3.4 — data/questionnaire/dynamic-generator.ts: GPT-5.2 generates structured question layers
E3.5 — API route: POST /api/questionnaire/generate (Gegenstand → questions)
E3.6 — Output format matches existing QuestionnaireLayer/QuestionField types
E3.7 — Fallback: if AI fails, use static carpentry questionnaire

features.title: Epic 4: Dynamic Questionnaire Renderer + Updated Scan Flow
features.description: Render AI-generated questions in existing questionnaire UI. Update scan flow to pass industry context. End-to-end testing and polish.

criteria.text: E4.1 — QuestionnaireScreen accepts dynamic layers (AI-generated or static fallback)
E4.2 — LayerRenderer handles AI-generated field types
E4.3 — ScanProvider stores company context (name, Gegenstand, industry_code)
E4.4 — Scan API uses industry context for regulation matching
E4.5 — Full flow works: search → confirm → questionnaire → scan → results
E4.6 — Mobile responsive for all new screens
E4.7 — Error handling: VPS down, AI timeout, no results
E4.8 — End-to-end test with 3+ different industries

features.title: Admin: Industry Templates Viewer
features.description: Read-only admin panel page showing all cached industry questionnaire templates. Displays industry name, code, usage count, creation date, and expandable question preview.

criteria.text: New 'Templates' item in admin sidebar navigation
API route GET /api/admin/templates fetches from industry_templates table
Table view: industry name (DE), industry code, usage count, created date
Expandable row showing actual questions (layer titles + field labels)
Empty state when no templates exist yet
Mobile responsive

features.title: Bug Fix: Remove hardcoded Tischlerei, free text industry
features.description: Two bugs reported by Raphael: (1) Scan history always showed 'Tischlerei' as niche — removed hardcoded fallback. (2) Industry dropdown only had carpentry — changed to free text input with AI dynamic scan routing.

criteria.text: Scan history shows actual industry or 'Unbekannte Branche'
Industry field is free text input (not dropdown)
Free-text industry routes to dynamic AI scan
AI classification label stored in businessProfile for history
Verified on production (smart-lex.de) via Chrome DevTools

features.title: Stripe + Paywall
features.description: Real payment integration replacing trial system. Stripe Checkout for €190/6mo initial, then €30/month recurring. Webhook handles subscription lifecycle. Plan syncs to Supabase profiles. Commission tracking for consultants (30% initial / 10% recurring).

criteria.text: Stripe Checkout flow: €190 initial (scan + 6mo subscription)
Recurring billing: €30/month after initial 6 months
Webhook handles subscription events (created, renewed, cancelled)
Plan status syncs to Supabase profiles (free → paid → expired)
Paywall blocks Pro features for non-subscribers
Commission tracking: record payment amounts per referred customer
Consultant dashboard: show earned amounts (30% × €190 initial + 10% × €30/mo recurring)
Admin: view total commission owed per consultant

features.notes: Pricing confirmed by Raphael (2026-03-28): €190 initial (scan + 6mo), then €30/month retainer. Commission: 30% first payment, 10% lifetime recurring. Payments go to Raphael's Stripe.

features.title: Referral System + Consultant Dashboard
features.description: Consultants (lawyers, insurance brokers, tax advisors) sign up, get referral codes, select expertise tags. Customers enter referral code → linked to that consultant. 'Get Professional Help' button signals matched expert. Consultant dashboard shows referrals, customers, bonus. Admin manages consultants and commission rates.
features.notes: Raphael funded M2 ($170) but wants M3 built first while he sets up Stripe. Commission confirmed (2026-03-28): 30% first payment, 10% lifetime recurring. Manual payout for now.

features.title: Two-Tier Commission Model
features.description: Split single commission_rate into two fields per Raphael's confirmation: 30% on first payment (€190), 10% lifetime on recurring (€30/month). Display both rates in consultant dashboard and admin panel.

criteria.text: DB migration: rename commission_rate → commission_rate_initial (default 30), add commission_rate_recurring (default 10)
Consultant registration: set defaults 30/10 on new signups
Consultant dashboard: show both rates (30% erste Zahlung / 10% laufend)
Admin panel: edit both rates per consultant
TypeScript types updated
Deployed + tested on VPS staging

features.title: Legal Compliance Popups (Disclaimer + Contact Consent)
features.description: Two mandatory popups per Raphael (2026-03-31): (1) Results disclaimer before viewing scan results — checkbox 'I understand and agree', saves acknowledgment per scan. (2) Contact consent before first help request — stored for purpose of expert contacting customer, shows once per user.

criteria.text: Disclaimer popup: shows every time before viewing scan results
Disclaimer popup: checkbox 'I understand and agree' required before proceeding
Disclaimer popup: saves acknowledgment to DB (user_id, scan_id, timestamp)
Disclaimer popup: German text — results are not legal advice, overview only
Contact consent popup: shows once when user first clicks 'Professionelle Hilfe'
Contact consent popup: after agreeing once, doesn't show again for that user
Contact consent popup: text — contact info stored for purpose of expert contacting customer
Contact consent popup: checkbox 'I agree' required
Both popups: mobile responsive
Both popups: i18n DE+EN
Deployed + tested on VPS staging

features.title: QR Code → Signup URL with Pre-filled Referral
features.description: QR code currently encodes plain text (e.g. '4GXVBMDB'). Should encode a signup URL with ?ref= parameter (e.g. 'https://smart-lex.de/de?ref=4GXVBMDB'). Scanning opens browser → signup page → referral code auto-filled.

criteria.text: QR code value: encode full URL https://smart-lex.de/de?ref=CODE instead of plain text
AuthForm: on mount, read ?ref= from URL and pre-fill referral code field
AuthForm: auto-switch to 'Registrieren' tab when ?ref= is present
AuthForm: auto-validate the pre-filled code (show green check + consultant name)
Deployed + tested on VPS staging

features.title: Epic 1: Database Schema + Consultant Accounts
features.description: Supabase tables for consultants, referral codes, and help requests. Consultant registration flow with expertise tag selection. Referral code auto-generation.

criteria.text: E1.1 — Supabase migration: consultants table (user_id, name, email, phone, bio, tags[], referral_code, commission_rate, is_active)
E1.2 — Supabase migration: referrals table (referral_code, customer_user_id, consultant_id, status, created_at)
E1.3 — Supabase migration: help_requests table (customer_user_id, consultant_id, category, status, contact_revealed, created_at)
E1.4 — Consultant registration API: POST /api/consultant/register (creates consultant profile + generates unique referral code)
E1.5 — Consultant profile API: GET/PATCH /api/consultant/profile (read + update tags, bio, contact info)
E1.6 — Expertise tags system: predefined categories matching compliance scan categories (labor law, insurance, tax, environment, etc.)
E1.7 — Consultant registration page with tag multi-select
E1.8 — Mobile responsive

features.title: Epic 2: Referral Flow + 'Get Professional Help' Button
features.description: Customer enters referral code at signup → linked to consultant. 'Get Professional Help' button on results page signals matched expert. Contact info revealed only when customer explicitly requests. Button hidden for categories without experts.

criteria.text: E2.1 — Referral code field on signup form (optional)
E2.2 — Referral validation API: GET /api/referral/validate?code=X (checks code exists, returns consultant name)
E2.3 — Referral tracking: when customer signs up with code, record in referrals table
E2.4 — Rename expert button to 'Professionelle Hilfe erhalten' (Get Professional Help) — lower barrier
E2.5 — Help request API: POST /api/help-request (customer clicks button → creates request, notifies consultant)
E2.6 — With referral code: always route to that specific consultant
E2.7 — Without referral code: random consultant with matching tags for that category
E2.8 — Hide 'Get Help' button for categories with no matched consultant
E2.9 — Contact reveal: customer contact info (email/phone) only shown to consultant after customer explicitly opts in
E2.10 — Mobile responsive

features.title: Epic 3: Consultant Dashboard + Admin Controls
features.description: Consultant-facing dashboard: see referred customers, help requests, bonus amounts. Admin panel: manage consultants, set commission rates, view referral stats.

criteria.text: E3.1 — Consultant dashboard page: overview stats (total referrals, active customers, pending help requests, total bonus earned)
E3.2 — Referral list: customer 1, 2, 3... with signup date, amount spent, referral bonus
E3.3 — Help requests list: customer name, category, date, status (pending/contacted/resolved), contact info (if revealed)
E3.4 — Notification indicator: new help requests since last visit
E3.5 — Consultant dashboard API: GET /api/consultant/dashboard (referrals + help requests + bonus summary)
E3.6 — Admin: consultants list (name, tags, referral count, active status)
E3.7 — Admin: set/update commission rate per consultant (configurable %)
E3.8 — Admin: activate/deactivate consultants
E3.9 — Admin: view all referral stats across consultants
E3.10 — i18n: all strings in de.json + en.json (Consultant + Admin namespaces)
E3.11 — Mobile responsive

features.title: Expert Improvements
features.description: Improved expert card UI. Industry-to-expert matching based on scan results. Future: experts can buy marketing priority (paid placement when customer has no referral code).

criteria.text: Improved expert card design
Industry-to-expert matching from scan results
Expert priority display logic (referral-linked first, then random from matching tags)

features.title: Expert Analytics (Click Tracking)
features.description: Track clicks on 'Ask a Question' and 'Get Help' buttons. Calculate conversion probability for consultant pricing model. Analytics dashboard for admin.

criteria.text: Click tracking on expert contact buttons
Conversion rate calculation
Admin analytics dashboard
Data export for pricing model

features.notes: From Raphael (2026-03-16): 'If 100 people click help button, ~20% convert to consultation @ €300 each = €6,000 value. Could charge €50/mo for consultant listing.' From Raphael (2026-03-28): 'We want to get consultants on board ASAP and after that we sell the leads to them as well.' Future feature: consultants can buy unmatched leads (customers who clicked Get Help without referral code).

features.title: Automated Regulation Updates
features.description: Monitor EUR-Lex and German legal databases for regulation changes. Auto-notify affected users. Long-term roadmap.

criteria.text: Regulation change detection
Affected user notification
Newsletter includes regulation updates
